title: Arms and the Man
writer: George Bernard Shaw, Johanna Sibelius, Eberhard Keindorff
actors: O.W. Fischer, Liselotte Pulver, Ellen Schwiers
plot: In 1865, Swiss captain Bluntschli fights as a mercenary in the war between Bulgaria and Serbia. When his group is attacked by a few Bulgarian troopers, he learns that he's got the wrong ammunition for his cannon and should flee. H...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 5 wins & 4 nominations total
